title: libkdumpfile bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.5.5-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.5.5
  Resolves: RHEL-86262

[0.5.4-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.5.4
  Resolves: RHEL-67143

[0.5.2-4]
- Add tests/ directory

[0.5.2-3]
- Add gating.yaml to RHEL9 libkdumpfile

[0.5.2-1]
- Update to 0.5.2
- Use SPDX license identifiers
- Fix documentation build to be properly be noarch

[0.5.1-4]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_39_Mass_Rebuild

[0.5.1-3]
- Rebuilt for Python 3.12
full_text:
[0.5.5-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.5.5
  Resolves: RHEL-86262

[0.5.4-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.5.4
  Resolves: RHEL-67143

[0.5.2-4]
- Add tests/ directory

[0.5.2-3]
- Add gating.yaml to RHEL9 libkdumpfile

[0.5.2-1]
- Update to 0.5.2
- Use SPDX license identifiers
- Fix documentation build to be properly be noarch

[0.5.1-4]

[0.5.1-3]
- Rebuilt for Python 3.12
